headline: XPENG Rolls Out China's First Mass-Produced L4 Robotaxi, Engineered with Pure Vision AI
reason: XPENG has become the first Chinese automaker to achieve mass production of an SAE Level 4 autonomous robotaxi developed entirely in-house. This significant technical milestone features a pure computer-vision solution (without LiDAR) powered by four self-developed Turing AI chips, delivering 3,000 TOPS of computing power. Pilot operations are targeted for the second half of 2026, indicating a major step towards widespread autonomous vehicle deployment.

headline: Anti-Aging Influencer Bryan Johnson Shares 41 Everyday Habits for Longevity Based on Millions Spent on Research
reason: Prominent longevity advocate Bryan Johnson, known for his extensive Project Blueprint protocol, has distilled years of experimentation and significant investment into a surprisingly accessible list of 41 actionable, human-centric protocols. These recommendations emphasize foundational aspects of healthspan, including consistent sleep patterns, a whole-foods diet, and regular exercise, offering practical guidance grounded in his longevity pursuit.

headline: Dow Jones Futures Recover as Iran-Oman Talks Raise Hopes for Geopolitical De-escalation
reason: Reports of diplomatic talks between Iran and Oman have signaled a potential easing of geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. This development provided a glimmer of relief to investors, leading to a recovery in Dow Jones futures and easing concerns that had been weighing on global markets, demonstrating a significant macro stock market shift driven by de-escalation hopes.

headline: Subquadratic Unveils SubQ 1M-Preview, the First Commercial Non-Transformer LLM with a 12-Million-Token Context Window
reason: This announcement marks a significant breakthrough in large language model (LLM) architecture. SubQ 1M-Preview is introduced as the first commercial non-transformer LLM, featuring an unprecedented 12-million-token context window. This innovation vastly enhances the model's capacity for long-document analysis, complex research workflows, and applications requiring persistent memory across extensive inputs, representing a notable shift in AI model behavior.

headline: Wind and Solar Overtake Fossil Fuels in EU Power Supply for the First Time
reason: In a historic milestone, wind and solar power have collectively generated more electricity than fossil fuels across the European Union for the first time. This achievement signifies substantial progress in the EU's clean energy transition and global efforts to combat climate change, demonstrating a significant shift towards renewable energy sources.
